raw_text: very disappointed with the service. the driver was rude. and refused doorstep delivery at night. he kept my product at an unknown shop and asked me to collect it. he cut the call while i was speaking. I complaint to customer care the agent call me and said it would be re-delivered. but now the status shows exchange completed and I haven't received the product or any call. when I contacted support again, the issue was already closed with no resolution.

Sometimes your delivery partners take their time and even seem to do their personal work while delivering orders. For example, the app shows the delivery will arrive in 10 minutes, but it ends up taking 40 minutes without any valid reason—there's no traffic or bad weather.

Worst customer service. I have ordered Boat ear bud, which I found dirty after opening the box. While connecting with customer care, they have told that they can't do anything and I have to use this used product . Can't imagine pathetic customer service like this from any other platform. I will ask everyone not to buy anything from Blinkit.

The order was not delivered and it showed in aap delivered. I paid extra as a rain surcharge as well. Post raising complaint they said checked with delivery partner it was delivered. Very pathetic after sale service. Seriously no otp verification during delivery. Guys don't order any valuable items. I saved since the order value was only 374.

Blinkit is the worst app for grocery shopping. Most of the products are either expired or broken when received. They don't even issue refunds and customer service is so bad. They don't have any reply to customers even after sending proofs of damaged items. Not going to waste my money here.

it was too good price and I really like this App because it delivered the food and groceries within 10 minutes and we can make anything in just 10 minutes because of blinkit and their their delivery partners were very honest and polite and in this app there are very low prices groceries are available and their groceries are very fresh and the game on the delivery bags of blinkit is very playful and enjoyable

EXTREMELY DISAPPOINTING EXPERIENCE. almost every order got delayed,and the app keeps showing "DELAYED" with no proper updates. the customer support is of no real help they provide generic response but rarely solve the actual problem. the worst part of the delivery experience. when I called the delivery partner to ask how long it would take,I was told that the order had not even been assigned properly and that I should just cancel it. As a customer,why should I be asked to cancel after Waiting

#1.Under "Order history" section, could you please add a TAB for PENDING RATING orders, upon clicking on which all the orders (which I haven't yet rated) loaded in front of me. Because in current situation, post rating an old order, it refreshes the list and scroll back to top, that's too much irritating to scroll down back to pending ones, please do something. Also add one tab for ALL orders, which shows all order again. #2. Please add feedback section with feedback history in app. Regards,

Over rated, for example : a product of 100, they charge 140, a 40% additional charge... If failed, to deliver they refund 100... 99% of the times they fail to deliver. Worst of all, there's no way to contact 1. Store 2. Customer Care 3. Delivery Partner

Not good, it very bad app you paid for product and they don't have return or refund policy even the product is damaged or in good condition.... according to blinkit if you buy anything then there is no going back .... so for me I have right to return the product if it's not for me, not good, not working but blinkit don't allow it..... I would use amazon or flipkart rather using blinkit it worst worst experience and worst service..... if I give me rating in minus it will be minus 100

I received a used product from Blinkit, which is completely unacceptable. The product was already opened/used and not in proper condition when delivered. I immediately raised a return request, but the return is being rejected without proper resolution. This is very disappointing customer service and unfair to customers who expect fresh and genuine products. I request Blinkit to arrange a return/refund for the used product at the earliest.

i have order some items but one item is missing but it is showing in bill so I contact customer care that item is out of stock at Dark store. If item is out of stock it should not be in my bill. if i have not checked properly then they just charge me with out delivery. i don't get any refund or coupon for missing item. worst service

Wonderful. The package was delivered as timely as I expected. The delivery partner has done a good job while tracking the address. He took a little more time due to the wrong location shown in the app. Overall experience is good. I appreciate.

The delivery partners assigned are very rude and irresponsible. I had to cancel my order ( ice cream )just for him,as he asked me to collect order from some other place very rudely. I have imported my permanent address from Zomato and also allowed my precise location to blinkit app. The delivery person was very rude and I also directed him my address via 🤙 call but he asked me to collect order from some other area . I won't suggest any one to use this app only for the delivery person.

worst instant delivery platform ever cause there have been no issues to get your sort out your issues and moreover it has issues regarding cancellation refund etc sometimes they do not accept the cash on delivery sometimes they increase the charge too much regarding the handling charge delivery charge and some type of small cart charge.

I am having the worst experience on this app right now. Before a few days they were delivering at my location and i ordered some products but now they suddenly stopped delivering when I tried readjusting my pin I found out they delivered just half a kilometre ahead from my location and not delivering at my location which is just half a kilometre ahead. I am very frustrated with this and now deleted the app because it is not fixing for many days.

Very disappointed with Blinkit. I ordered a trimmer that was defective and not working properly. While using it, I got injured. I immediately contacted customer support and shared a video as proof, but all they kept saying was "Sorry for the inconvenience." They refused to replace or return the product and said they had no option. I even requested them to take it back so I could order another brand and pay the difference, but they declined. Poor after-sales service and no concern for cust

I accidentally placed an order by mistake. It happened suddenly, and I didn’t get the chance to review it properly. Unfortunately, I’m unable to cancel it. ln help centre l requested many times but they denied it.

this app is just horrible it has a lot of network issues and then has double orders of the same thing then when talked for assistance to cancel one they will just do timepass asking again and again what the reason is and would u still like to cancel and all till the order is packed and then say sorry the order is packed now can't cancel

I used this since it is grofers., today I uncovered the hard truth -> they won't value customers. I ordered a ruff pad. 1st time, pen was missing. After replacement.. the replaced product box and seal are tampered and other plaster mark was present. Initially cleaning of ruff pad is also not working and later it worked after multiple tries. they are not willing to give my money back by taking product... 2hours of calls.. from 11:30-12:30pm. BBnow(Tata) would have solved this issue in seconds
